CustomField.description: Do not send SMS if conditions are matching
CustomField.formula: External_Status_Current__c = 'Z' || External_Status_Current__c = 'U' || External_Status_Current__c = 'L' || External_Status_Current__c = 'B' || ISPICKVAL(Collection_Sub_Status__c, 'Cease and Desist – in writing') || ISPICKVAL(Collection_Sub_Status__c, 'Consumer Proposal') || ISPICKVAL(Collection_Sub_Status__c, 'Bankrupt Account') || ISPICKVAL(Collection_Sub_Status__c, 'Credit Counselling') || ISPICKVAL(Collection_Sub_Status__c, 'Previously Paid with Agency') || ISPICKVAL(Collection_Sub_Status__c, 'Deceased') || ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c, 'Workout Program') || ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c, 'Prepared for Legal') || ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c, 'Settlement') || ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c, 'All Actions complete')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Do not send SMS if conditions are matching
CustomField.label: Exclude For SMS
